{{Infobox character
| name = Reaver
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Iron Legion]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Reavers]] are biological abominations created by the [[Iron Legion]]. These creatures retain much of their original organic form, appearing as men with metal armor fused directly into their flesh. They are physically enhanced beyond normal limits, making them dangerous combatants that often require multiple shots to defeat. Their physical composition varies, but common configurations include limbs transformed into weaponry; for example, one arm may grow into a blade while the other functions as a firearm. Some specimens exhibit mechanical eyes that can flash red, and they have been observed showing signs of discipline, such as bowing to [[Iron]] Legionnaires.}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Reaver]] can optionally be part of the crew complement for an [[Iron Legion]] Penetrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Reaver]] is part of the [[Iron Legion]]'s normal ambush tactics.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Reavers]] are abominations of the [[Iron Legion]] that possess a mix of organic structure and living [[steel]] armor.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17">''The Captain'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Reaver]] is a humanoid figure with reanimated flesh and cyborg pieces.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c20">''The Captain'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Reavers]] are entities that can be sealed to ceilings.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Send Omega," I said, as I put a bullet through an Iron Pawn with one hand and sealed a Reaver to the ceiling with the other.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Iron Legion]]
